questionHtml:
Study the given bar graph and answer the question that follows.
The bar graph shows the exports of cars of type A and B (in ₹ millions ) from 2014 to 2018

The total exports of cars of type A from 2014 to 2016 is approximately what percentage less than the total exports of cars of type B from 2015 to 2017 (correct to one decimal place )

  2. 11.7%

  3. 11.3%

  4. 13.8%
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:

subject: Mathematics
